name: @pryzm/expr-eval
description: PRYZM 2 — light parametric expression evaluator (S25, SPEC-01 §4.1).  Pure-TS, dependency-free, NO constraint solver.  Supports `length = a + b`, `angle = 90 * 0.5`, etc.  The Phase 3A constraint solver (`packages/constraint-solver/`) is a separate, larger surface that arrives at S49+.
